raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is reachable by the right end-effector and there is free tabletop space to the right of the cup so it can be displaced without colliding with box_1 or box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is pushed to the right, clearing the front workspace near box_2/box_1 to avoid interference during the box lift."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right end-effector has lateral access to box_2 and there is free space to the right so box_2 can be shifted without hitting the cup or reaching the table edge; box_2 remains supported on the table while being pushed.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is shifted slightly to the right, creating a clearance gap between box_2 and box_1 (they are no longer in contact), exposing a side face of box_1 for a secure two-hand hold."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 has sufficient side clearance on both left and right faces for both end-effectors to clamp and lift; box_2 and the cup are out of the immediate lift path; the table edge is not obstructing the arms' approach.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (dark brown) is securely held and lifted off the table by both arms, completing the pick-up."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is reachable by the right end-effector and there is free tabletop space to the right of the cup so it can be displaced without colliding with box_1 or box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is pushed to the right, clearing the front workspace near box_2/box_1 to avoid interference during the box lift.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right end-effector has lateral access to box_2 and there is free space to the right so box_2 can be shifted without hitting the cup or reaching the table edge; box_2 remains supported on the table while being pushed.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is shifted slightly to the right, creating a clearance gap between box_2 and box_1 (they are no longer in contact), exposing a side face of box_1 for a secure two-hand hold.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 has sufficient side clearance on both left and right faces for both end-effectors to clamp and lift; box_2 and the cup are out of the immediate lift path; the table edge is not obstructing the arms' approach.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (dark brown) is securely held and lifted off the table by both arms, completing the pick-up.
